pi_items.verified_value: global warming (Global Warming Potential / GWP / Climate Change)
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed that global warming is a standard LCIA impact category across TRACI, ReCiPe, and CML methods, typically measured in kg CO2-eq. See ecoinvent impact assessment documentation and One Click LCA impact categories reference.
Verified in setup_openlca.sh line 22: 'mkdir -p "$home_dir/LCA_Results"' which creates ~/LCA_Results for user ga. Also confirmed in export_result.sh line 17 and setup_task.sh line 16.

Web search confirmed that USLCI database contains electricity generation and grid electricity processes. Multiple sources confirm electricity is a major product system in USLCI with specific LCI data for US grid electricity including generation, transmission, and fossil/renewable fuel mix.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves calculating Life Cycle Impact Assessment results for an electricity product system from the publicly available USLCI (US Life Cycle Inventory) database in openLCA. The USLCI database is maintained by NREL at the Federal LCA Commons (lcacommons.gov) and contains over 550 process LCIs including comprehensive electricity generation data for the US national grid. Global warming potential (GWP) / climate change is a standard LCIA impact category measured in kg CO2-eq across all major LCIA methods (TRACI, ReCiPe, CML). Results are exported to the /home/ga/LCA_Results directory on the system.
